text: Achieving a healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well, though a balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains is a great start. Regular exercise, like brisk walking or cycling for 30 minutes most days, boosts your physical strength and mood. Equally important is getting enough sleep, around seven to nine hours each night, which helps your body recover and your mind stay sharp. Don’t forget mental health—taking breaks to relax or talk with friends can reduce stress. Finally, finding a good work-life balance means setting boundaries so you have time for hobbies and rest.
